💜 Your AI Companion · Always Learning

Meet Your
Perfect Day AI

HeadyBuddy lives in your browser and learns who you are. Intelligent search, voice-to-text dictation, persistent memory, creative tools, and a soul that grows with every interaction.

Install Chrome Extension → See Features
Features

Not Just Smart.
Thoughtful.

Everything you wish your AI assistant actually did.

🧠

3D Vector Memory

HeadyBuddy remembers everything — not in a flat list, but in a 3D vector space that mirrors how your brain connects ideas. Context persists across sessions, devices, and time.

🎤

Voice Dictation

Speak on your phone, watch it appear on your computer. Cross-device voice-to-text relay with real-time transcription powered by Web Speech API.

🔍

Smart Search

Replaces your new-tab page with AI-powered search. Every query enriched by Heady™'s knowledge base. Search history, favorites, and instant answers.

💫

Soul Engine

HeadyBuddy has a soul — a personality layer that develops over time. It learns your preferences, communication style, and work patterns to become uniquely yours.

🔗

Cross-Device Sync

Your memory, preferences, and conversations sync across every device. Start on your laptop, continue on your phone, finish on your tablet.

🛡️

Privacy First

Your data stays yours. Local-first processing with optional cloud sync. End-to-end encryption for all personal data. No data selling, ever.

How It Works

Three Steps. One Companion.

1

Install the Extension

Add HeadyBuddy to Chrome, Firefox, or Edge. It replaces your new-tab page and adds an AI sidebar to every webpage you visit.

2

Start Interacting

Search, ask questions, dictate notes, or just explore. HeadyBuddy learns from every interaction and builds a memory map unique to you.

3

Watch It Grow

Over time, HeadyBuddy becomes your most valuable tool. It anticipates your needs, surfaces relevant context, and helps you think through problems faster.

Ready for a Buddy
That Actually Helps?

Free forever for individuals. Pro plans for power users who want unlimited memory and priority AI.

Install Free — Chrome Firefox Edge
